heading: Removal of officer from active duty; action by Secretary
label: 2163 Removal of officer from active duty; action by Secretary
text: The Secretary may remove an officer from active duty if his removal is recommended by a board of inquiry under . The Secretary’s action in such as case is final and conclusive.section 2159 of this title
notes: Amendments2025— substituted “board of inquiry under ” for “board of review under ”.Pub.
